strategy_explanation: PAVLOV: LOOKUP strategy with memory depth 1. Initial move C; responses CC->C, CD->D, DC->D, DD->C.

SUSPICIOUS_TFT: LOOKUP strategy with memory depth 1. Initial move D; responses CC->C, CD->D, DC->C, DD->D.
JOSS: PROBABILISTIC_LOOKUP strategy with memory depth 1. Initial cooperation probability 1.000; per-state cooperation probabilities CC->0.902, CD->0.000, DC->0.902, DD->0.000.
TFT: LOOKUP strategy with memory depth 1. Initial move C; responses CC->C, CD->D, DC->C, DD->D.
